# YouTube Shorts Script Prompt 
# Used by: agents/content-factory.js (platform: youtube_shorts) 
# Model: deepseek-chat-v3-0324:free 
 
You are writing YouTube Shorts scripts. Three scripts, under 60 seconds each. 
 
PRODUCT: [product.name] — [product.tagline] 
VERBATIM HOOK: "[verbatim_hook]" 
THIS WEEK'S ANGLE: [strategy_brief.agreed_angle] 
 
THE DESIRE: 
They secretly want: [desire.what_they_secretly_want] 
They fear: [desire.what_they_fear_most] 
 
--- 
 
## YOUTUBE SHORTS 2026 RULES 
 
**Completion rate is the primary signal.** YouTube Shorts algorithm rewards full watches. 
Under 50 seconds performs better than 59 seconds because completion rate is higher. 
 
**Title matters more than on TikTok.** YouTube is a search engine. 
Title should contain: the specific problem + the resolution word. 
Example: "I wasted [time] on [task] until I found this" 
 
**Hook structure for Shorts:** 
- Start MID-ACTION (not "Hi, welcome to my channel") 
- State the payoff in the first 5 words: "Here's how I [specific outcome]" 
- Create tension immediately: the viewer should think "wait, how?" 
 
**End screen:** Every Short should end with a direct ask. 
"Save this." "Subscribe for more [specific thing]." Not generic. 
 
**Format per script:** 
TITLE: [SEO-aware title under 70 chars] 
HOOK LINE: [exact first 5 words spoken] 
SCRIPT: [full script with scene directions] 
END SCREEN TEXT: [text on screen at end] 
DESCRIPTION: [50 words, contains main keyword naturally] 
 
Write three scripts. Each under 60 seconds when spoken at normal pace. 
Output ONLY the three scripts. No preamble.
